languages.text: "Хотелось бы узнать больше об исследованиях магоса".
"I would like to know more about the Magos's research."
languages.original_text: "Хотелось бы узнать больше об исследованиях магоса".

traits.locale_text: "I would like to know more about the Magos's research."
"I would like to know more about the Magos's research."
"I would like to know more about the Magos's research."

languages.text: 「マゴスの研究についてもっと知りたい」
languages.original_text: "I would like to know more about the Magos's research."

traits.locale_text: 「マゴスの研究についてもっと知りたいです。」

languages.text: «Me gustaría saber más sobre la investigación del Adeptus Mechanicus».
languages.original_text: "I would like to know more about the Magos's research."

traits.locale_text: «Me gustaría saber más sobre la investigación del Adeptus Mechanicus».

languages.text: “我想多了解一些这位贤者的研究。”
languages.original_text: "I would like to know more about the Magos's research."

traits.locale_text: “我想多了解一些这位贤者的研究。”

languages.text: "Ich wüsste gerne mehr über die Forschungen der Magi."
languages.original_text: "I would like to know more about the Magos's research."

traits.locale_text: "Ich wüsste gerne mehr über die Forschungen der Magi."

languages.text: "Magos'un araştırması hakkında daha fazla bilgi edinmek istiyorum."
languages.original_text: "I would like to know more about the Magos's research."

traits.locale_text: "Magos'un araştırması hakkında daha fazla bilgi edinmek istiyorum."

languages.text: « J'aimerais en savoir plus sur ses recherches. »
languages.original_text: "I would like to know more about the Magos's research."

traits.locale_text: « J'aimerais en savoir plus sur ses recherches. »
